Kevin Hollinrake

Member of Parliament for Thirsk and Malton

I'm Kevin Hollinrake, the Member of Parliament for Thirsk and Malton. On this website you can find my campaigns, news and political priorities, as well as more about me. You can also get in touch - I look forward to hearing from you.

Join Kevin's email newsletter
